benefits.description: Feels less stressed and anti-anxiety effect noticed immediately; describes self as normally a very 'stressy' person

side_effects.description: Shooting pain sensation behind shoulder and front of shoulder after injection into left side delt; described as BANG pain, more uncomfortable than painful, comes and goes randomly

protocol_notes: Injecting with 0.5 inch needle into left side delt as local injection for suspected labrum tear. Started 3 days prior to comment.
